Sunsaber.name: Sunsaber
Sunsaber.description:
Bright 15

This weapon's dégâts becomes fire, and its luminous property sheds bright light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre and dim light for an additional 5 mètres while activated, instead of only dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre. De plus, when you would make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps with a weapon with the bright property, you can instead force la cible to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon, or the bright number, whichever is lower). If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes normal weapon dégâts and is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit, and la créature takes additional dégâts of the same type at the start of its next turn equal to your governing modificateur de caractéristique.

Dexterity 11

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Hidden

You have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal a weapon with this property.

Versatile ([[/r 2d4]])

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Special

specialized (bright)

Lightfist.name: Lightfist
Lightfist.description:
Disguised

You have avantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to hide the nature of a weapon with this property.

Disruptive

When a creature is forced to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration due to taking dégâts from a weapon with the disruptive property, the DD for the check equals 10 or the full dégâts taken, whichever number is higher, instead of only half.

Fixed

A weapon with this property does not fill the hand, but you can't use the weapon while the hand is full. De plus, you have a +10 bonus to test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Bustersaber.name: Bustersaber
Bustersaber.description:
Brutal 1

When you score a critical hit with a weapon with the brutal property, you roll a number of additional weapon dégâts dice equal to the brutal number.

Dexterity 19

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Heavy

Quand vous contactez avec an attack roll using Strength with a weapon with this property, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Strength modificateur (minimum of +1).

Keen 1

When you make a attaque d'arme with a weapon with the keen property, the critical hit range increases by an amount equal to the keen number.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Phase knife.description:

Disguised

You have avantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to hide the nature of a weapon with this property.

Hidden

Keen 1

Light

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Vicious 1

Whenever you deal dégâts with a weapon with the vicious property and roll the maximum on a weapon dégâts die, you gain a bonus to dégâts equal to the vicious number.

Hidden

Versatile ([[/r 1d10]])

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Wristsaber.name: Wristsaber
Wristsaber.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Fixed

A weapon with this property does not fill the hand, but you can't use the weapon while the hand is full. De plus, you have a +10 bonus to test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Lightblade.name: Lightblade
Lightblade.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Hidden

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Splitsaber.name: Splitsaber
Splitsaber.description:
Double ([[/r 2d4]] energy)

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Interlocking

While wielding a weapon with the interlocking property, you can use your object interaction to detach the weapon into two separate weapons or reattach into a single weapon. While separated, each weapon has the same dégâts, type de dégâts, combined value and weight, and properties (except for the double property) as the single weapon.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Two-handed

Bitesaber.name: Bitesaber
Bitesaber.description:
Biting 13

This weapon's dégâts becomes acid. De plus, when you would make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps with a weapon with the biting property, you can instead force la cible to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon, or the biting number, whichever is lower). If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes normal weapon dégâts and is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. If dégâts dealt by this weapon reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Hidden

You have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal a weapon with this property.

Luminous

Dire 1

Before you make a attaque d'arme with a weapon with the dire property, vous pouvez choisir to suffer a penalty to the attack roll up to the dire number. If you do so and you hit with it, you gain an equivalent bonus to the jet de dégâts.

Finesse

Hidden

You have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal a weapon with this property.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Returning

When you throw a weapon with this property, it automatically returns to your hand after the attack is complete, whether you hit or miss.

Thrown (range 25/75)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Guard shoto.description:
Defensive 1

When you make your first attack on your turn with a weapon with the defensive property, vous pouvez choisir to suffer a penalty to attack and jet de dégâtss with that weapon up to the defensive number. If you do so, you gain the same bonus to AC. These effects last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, as long as you're holding the weapon.

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Description

The retrosaber is an ancient type of lightweapon that requires a power cell to function. Once four attacks have been made with a retrosaber, a character must replace the power cell using an action or action bonus. You must have one free hand to replace the power cell.

Saberstaff.name: Saberstaff
Saberstaff.description:
Modal (double sabre et bâton technique)

Une arme avec cette propriété peut basculer entre les modes. Une liste d'armes entre parenthèses apparaît avec la propriété : les armes entre lesquelles une arme exotique peut être commutée en utilisant une interaction d'objet.

Saberwhip.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Hidden

You have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal a weapon with this property.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Chained lightdagger.name: Chained lightdagger
Chained lightdagger.description:
Disarming

When you score a critical hit with a weapon with the disarming property against a creature that is holding an object, you can attempt to disarm la cible (no action required). If la cible is no more than one size larger than you (your size or smaller if your weapon has the light property), it must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or it drops an object de votre choix at its mètres.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Dual-phase saber.name: Dual-phase saber
Dual-phase saber.description:
Dexterity 13

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Hidden

You have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal a weapon with this property.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Versatile ([[/r 1d12]])

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Vicious 1

Whenever you deal dégâts with a weapon with the vicious property and roll the maximum on a weapon dégâts die, you gain a bonus to dégâts equal to the vicious number.

Lightnodachi.name: Lightnodachi
Lightnodachi.description:
Dexterity 17

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Piercing 1

Before you make a attaque d'arme with a weapon with the piercing property, vous pouvez choisir to gain a bonus to the attack roll up to the piercing number. If you do so and you hit with it, you suffer an equivalent penalty to the jet de dégâts.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Vicious 1

Whenever you deal dégâts with a weapon with the vicious property and roll the maximum on a weapon dégâts die, you gain a bonus to dégâts equal to the vicious number.

Lightsaber pike.description:
Dexterity 11

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Double ([[/r 1d8]] energy)

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Reach

Lightclub.name: Lightclub
Lightclub.description:
Dexterity 11

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Heavy

Quand vous contactez avec an attack roll using Strength with a weapon with this property, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Strength modificateur (minimum of +1).

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Hidden

Splitshoto.name: Splitshoto
Splitshoto.description:
Double ([[/r 1d8]] energy)

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Interlocking

While wielding a weapon with the interlocking property, you can use your object interaction to detach the weapon into two separate weapons or reattach into a single weapon. While separated, each weapon has the same dégâts, type de dégâts, combined value and weight, and properties (except for the double property) as the single weapon.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Sabergauntlet.name: Sabergauntlet
Sabergauntlet.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Fixed

A weapon with this property does not fill the hand, but you can't use the weapon while the hand is full. De plus, you have a +10 bonus to test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.
